message:
feat(connectors): implement ConnectorErrorMapping trait across 6 connectors

Add fcp-sdk dependency and implement the ConnectorErrorMapping trait
for anthropic, figma, github, gitlab, postgresql, and redis connectors.
This replaces the per-connector hand-rolled error conversion pattern
with a unified trait from fcp-sdk::migration that standardizes how
connector errors map to/from FcpError and AsyncError.

Each implementation provides:
- from_async_error(): converts AsyncError (Timeout, Cancelled, other)
  into the connector's native error type with appropriate status codes
- to_fcp_error(): delegates to the existing inherent method
- is_retryable(): delegates to the existing inherent method
- retry_after(): delegates to the existing inherent method

This is the "exception-ledger thinking retirement" described in the
FCP3 migration plan — replacing ad hoc per-connector error handling
with a composable trait contract.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
